ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(ISBLANK(Country)), OR( ISBLANK(TEXT(Area__c)), AND( TEXT(Area__c) <> "UN-Unknown", OR( AND( Country = "Australia", NOT( OR( LEFT(TEXT(Area__c), 2) = "AU", LEFT(TEXT(Area__c), 2) = "NZ" ) ) ), AND( Country <> "Australia", LEFT(TEXT(Area__c), 2) <> CASE( Country, "Brunei Darussalam", "BN", "Indonesia", "ID", "India", "IN", "Malaysia", "MY", "New Zealand", "NZ", "Philippines", "PH", "Singapore", "SG", "Thailand", "TH", "Vietnam", "VN", "" ) ) ) ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please assign the correct area of the country
